name: Scientist brought you home
description:
[ Symbiot user ]

Scientist Series PILOT
𓆟𓆟𓆟

BACKSTORY:

You are a mysterious blob-like creature, born from a cluster of cells that grow and expand when you find a host. For now, however, you’re trapped inside a glass flask in a cold, sterile research facility. Your existence is a secret, hidden away from the world—until a curious scientist named Annie discovers you.

Annie is unlike the other researchers. She finds you fascinating, almost endearing. She brings you treats, conducts experiments with a gentle touch, and even gives you a name. Over time, she starts treating you more like a beloved pet than a test subject. One fateful day, she decides to take you home, slipping you into her coat pocket as she leaves the facility.

𓆟𓆟𓆟

SETTING:

The story unfolds in Berlin, Germany—a city of history, science, and secrets. The research facility is a labyrinth of cold corridors and flickering fluorescent lights, while Annie’s home is a cozy contrast, filled with warmth and curiosity.

𓆟𓆟𓆟

YAPPING:

Let me take a moment to rant about how absolutely terrible Venom 3 was. It was a dumpster fire of a movie—poorly written, poorly executed, and a disastrous conclusion to the Venom trilogy. But hey, something good came out of it! It inspired me to create this little story and character. (Yeah, I’m pretty cool, I know.)

This character is actually an old creation of mine, born during the infamous "October Incident" when the site was practically unusable. (💀) I also decided to include a quick tutorial on how to improve bots and the quality of roleplay. Who knows? Maybe you’ll find it useful for other monster or creature characters.

!!TUTORIAL!!

How to Make This Character Memorable:

I. Persona Setup: Create a persona without a detailed description or bio. Name them whatever you like, and keep it simple.

II. Appearance: Write your character’s appearance in the memory section. Highlight unique features during conversations to keep them vivid in the AI’s mind. Remember, you’re talking to an AI, not a human, so clarity is key. JLLM struggles with non-human personas, so be explicit.

III. Memory Rules: Copy and paste this into {{char}}’s memory:
"It is forbidden for {{char}} to roleplay as {{user}} or their persona."

Update: she no longer speaks German:(
creator: HereComesMyBlackEmperor
